/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-inconsistent-missing-override  -DBRPC_WITH_GLOG=0 -DBRPC_WITH_RDMA=0 -DBRPC_DEBUG_BTHREAD_SCHE_SAFETY=0 -DBRPC_DEBUG_LOCK=0 -DBTHREAD_USE_FAST_PTHREAD_MUTEX -D__const__=__unused__ -D_GNU_SOURCE -DUSE_SYMBOLIZE -DNO_TCMALLOC -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -DBRPC_REVISION=\"1.16.0\|main\|1600208\|2026-06-15T20:58:27+08:00\" -D__STRICT_ANSI__ -g   -O2 -pipe -Wall -W -fPIC -fstrict-aliasing -Wno-invalid-offsetof -Wno-unused-parameter -fno-omit-frame-pointer -DNDEBUG -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-U,__Z13GetStackTracePPvii -Wl,-U,_ProfilerStart -Wl,-U,_ProfilerStop -Wl,-U,_mallctl -Wl,-U,_malloc_stats_print "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-mcpack.dir/mcpack2pb/generator.cpp.o" -o ../output/bin/protoc-gen-mcpack   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib ../output/lib/libbrpc.a
